interesting_fact: Japan has more vending machines than people in some cities.
Canada has the longest coastline of any country in the world.
Brazil is home to the Amazon Rainforest, the largest tropical rainforest in the world.
Germany is the birthplace of the printing press and Oktoberfest.
Australia is home to the world's largest coral reef system, the Great Barrier Reef.
Egypt is home to the ancient Pyramids of Giza, one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World.
India is the largest producer of milk in the world.
Italy has more UNESCO World Heritage Sites than any other country.
